roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN APPEARING/3000ADM/X:PETITION IS AMENDED AS TO VIOLATION #1 FOR POSSESSION OF AN/X: IMITATION FIREARM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #1, AS AMENDED/3000REIN/PAJ: 90 DAYS/X: WITH NO TIME LOST/4019HALF/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 23 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORTTO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/X: PETITION IS MODIFIED -ADD ALLEGATION #3 OF:POSSESION OF FIREARM/ /X: PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING HELD ON THE RECORD/WITEXCL/INVOFF: RAMY YASSINE/WIT SWORN DA: SIU-CAIN; PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE;/EXHMA: EX 1- DOCUMENT - NOTICE OF CONDITIONS OF PAROLE;/EXHMA: EX 2 -DOCUMENT - NOTICE & REQUEST FOR COUNTY JAIL ASSISTANCE/X: EXHIBIT  2 WAS SERVED BY PAROLE AGENT YASSINE TO THE DEFENDANT/X: DURING THE HEARING, THE DEFENDANT BECAME ILL/X: THE HEARING IS BIFURCATED TO A NEW DATE/X: PEOPLE'SWITNESS SIU-CAIN IS EXCUSED AND NOT SUBJECT TO RECALL/CONT/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT RAMY YASSINE APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TOTHE ALLEGATIONS/NB/ /X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/X: TIME IS NOTWAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/CONTD: PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DOP/
